chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-4326 of 2019 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1.For hearing of CMA No.18951/2019 2.For hearing of main case. 13.03.2025 Mr.Qazi Umair Ali, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr.Kashif Nazeer, Assistant Attorney General. Mr.Faheem Raza, Advocate has filed Vakalatnama on behalf of Respondent (F.B.R), which is taken on record. It is jointly submitted that this petition is covered by Division Bench judgment dated 21.11.2024 passed in C.P.No.D-3523 of 2022, therefore, this petition may be disposed of in the same terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge nasir
